features.title: Why people choose Deal
features.subtitle: A faster, safer and simpler way to trade.

fast.title: List in 30 seconds
fast.desc: Snap a photo, add a price and publish. Your ad goes live instantly — no paperwork.

secure.title: Verified & secure
secure.desc: Verified profiles and in-app reporting keep scammers out and your deals safe.

chat.title: Contact via WhatsApp
chat.desc: No in-app chat needed — reach buyers and sellers directly on WhatsApp to agree on the details.

search.title: Smart search & filters
search.desc: Filter by price, location and condition to find exactly what you need.

local.title: Local deals near you
local.desc: Discover listings in your neighborhood and meet sellers close to home.

free.title: Free to post
free.desc: Posting your first listings is completely free. Sell more without extra fees.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about getting started.

q1.a: Yes. Browsing and posting listings is free. Optional paid boosts are available if you want extra visibility for your ad.

q2.q: How do I post a listing?
q2.a: Download the app, create an account, tap the “+” button, add photos, a price and a description, then publish. Your ad goes live in seconds.

q3.q: How does Deal keep me safe?
q3.a: We verify accounts, monitor activity and give you tools to report suspicious users. We always recommend meeting in public places for in-person deals.

q4.q: Which categories can I sell in?
q4.a: You can buy and sell cars, home furniture, women's accessories, houses and mobiles.

q5.a: Deal is available on both iOS and Android, and works on phones and tablets.

homeCta.title: Ready to make your first deal?
homeCta.subtitle: Be among the first to buy and sell on Deal across Iraq. Download the app today — it only takes a minute.

about.title: About Deal
about.subtitle: A new Iraqi marketplace built to give you more value for less.
about.introBody: Deal is a new marketplace that connects buyers and sellers across all of Iraq in one simple, trusted place. Whether you are selling a car, home furniture, women's accessories, a house or a mobile phone, Deal makes it easy to reach real people near you and agree on a deal directly.
about.visionBody: To become the most trusted and most affordable marketplace in Iraq — a place where every deal feels safe, simple and fair.
about.missionBody: To give people real value by keeping service fees low, so buying and selling stays simple and affordable for everyone.
about.storyBody: Deal was founded in 2026. We noticed that similar apps charge high service fees, making buying and selling more expensive than it should be. So we decided to enter the market with a different approach: a clean, easy app that covers all of Iraq and delivers real value with much lower service fees. We are just getting started, and every update is shaped by the people who use Deal.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or some feedback? We would love to hear from you.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

contact.success: Thanks! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: At Deal (the “App”, “we”, “our”), we are committed to protecting the privacy of our users. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, protect and share your data when you use our app. This policy has been prepared to comply with global laws and the standards of the Google Play Store and the Apple App Store.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.body: We collect specific types of data to provide and improve our services. Personal Data: such as your name, phone number (used for OTP verification at registration), email address and profile information. User-Generated Content: the photos, text and details you share when you create a post to sell or list a product (such as cars or others). Technical and non-personal data: including device data, IP addresses, usage logs and unique notification identifiers (Device Tokens).

use.title: Why we collect your data
use.body: Your data is handled transparently for the following purposes: Account management — creating and securing user accounts and performing OTP verification. System operation — allowing you to create posts, browse products and categories, and add photos to your listings. Communication and notifications — sending important updates and alerts related to posts or security. Improving the user experience — personalizing content, saving settings (such as language and light/dark theme) and resolving technical issues.

permissions.title: Sensitive permissions
permissions.body: For the app to work correctly, we will ask you to grant a set of permissions, which you can withdraw at any time from your device settings. Camera & Storage: to let you pick or capture photos to upload with the listings you create, or to update your profile picture. Push Notifications: to send instant updates about your account activity and posts via Firebase Cloud Messaging.

thirdParty.title: Sharing data with third parties
thirdParty.body: We never sell your data. We may share some necessary data with trusted third-party service providers solely to operate the app. Firebase (Core & Messaging): to manage push notifications and process security analytics and app stability. Cloud servers and payment APIs: to securely connect the app's data to our backend.

retention.title: Data retention and account deletion
retention.body: In line with Google and Apple policies, you have full control over your data and the right to erase it. Retention: we keep your personal data for as long as your account is active in order to provide our services to you. Account and data deletion: you have the right at any time to request deletion of your account and all your posts, and permanent erasure of your data from our servers, through the “Delete Account” option available inside the app, by contacting our support team, or by reaching out to us directly.

children.title: Children's privacy
children.body: Our app is primarily intended for an adult audience and is not designed or directed at children under the age of 13 (or the legal age in your country). We do not knowingly collect any personal data from children. If we learn that we have collected information from a child under 13, we will take the necessary steps to remove that information as quickly as possible, in compliance with COPPA and international laws.

protect.title: Data security
protect.body: We use advanced protection protocols (such as encryption of data in transit and secure storage) to protect your information from unauthorized access, modification, destruction or disclosure. However, no method of transmitting data over the internet can be guaranteed to be 100% secure.

changes.title: Changes to this Privacy Policy
changes.body: We reserve the right to make changes to this Privacy Policy at any time. We will notify you of any significant changes through an in-app notice, and this page will be updated accordingly.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: For any questions about this Privacy Policy, or to submit requests regarding the deletion of your account and personal data, please contact us by email at haider.alwide@gmail.com and our team will be happy to help.

footer.about: Deal is your smart marketplace for buying and selling cars, home furniture, accessories, houses and mobiles across Iraq — quickly, safely and locally.
footer.madeWith: Built for buyers and sellers everywhere.
